## Checklist

- [ ] OIDC login tested (often works out of the box)
- [ ] User enrichment adapter implemented (department, location)
- [ ] Admin group support implemented
- [ ] `docs/identity-providers.md` updated
- [ ] `.env.example` updated
- [ ] `README.md` integration table updated
- [ ] PR opened
